zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William De Banastre I於1341年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可洛斯頓時，他的父親Sir Adam de Banastre31歲，母親Mrs Petronella de Banastre29歲。他和Sybill de Hoghton至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1370年在英國藍卡爾霍利享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William De Banastre I was born in 1341, in Croston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Adam de Banastre, was 31 and his mother, Mrs Petronella de Banastre, was 29. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sybill de Hoghton. He died in 1370, in Chorley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William De Banastre I est né en 1341, à Croston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam de Banastre, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Petronella de Banastre, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sybill de Hoghton. Il est décédé en 1370, à Chorley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

Er hatte mit Sybill de Hoghton mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Chorley, Lancashire, England.

ko.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: 영국 랭카실르 뱅크 홀 니아어 플레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lord William De Banastre I(이)가 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Banastre(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Petronella de Banastre(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Sybill de Hoghton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 랭카실르 초를리에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: банк холл нир престон, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William De Banastre I родился в 1341 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Banastre было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Petronella de Banastre, 29. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Sybill de Hoghton. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности чаурли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.
